name: HWR_GBL_PRFL_METRC_CMP_B
description: This table is for Metric_Score at Global Profile List for Issue count + Post count - Compliance_data

columns.Name: GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the global profile id of the user

columns.Name: HWR_ORG_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the org id of the user

columns.Name: TYPE_OF_RECORD
columns.Comments: This column is the id indicating the type of the post-control record

columns.Name: CONTROL_KEY
columns.Comments: This column is the key of the control key this record is representing

columns.Name: TOTAL_POST_COUNT
columns.Comments: This column is the total post count for score metric at global profile level

columns.Name: TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT
columns.Comments: This column is the total issue count for score metric at global profile level

columns.Name: VELOCITY
columns.Comments: This column is the mean velocity for score metric at global profile level

columns.Name: METRIC_DATE
columns.Comments: This column is the date this metric record is for

columns.Name: GBL_CMP_METRIC_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: This column is the global comp metric attribute 1

columns.Name: GBL_CMP_METRIC_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: This column is the global comp metric attribute 2

columns.Name: GBL_CMP_METRIC_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: This column is the global comp metric attribute 3

columns.Name: GBL_CMP_METRIC_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: This column is the global comp metric attribute 4

columns.Name: GBL_CMP_METRIC_ATTR_5
columns.Comments: This column is the global comp metric attribute 5

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
